summary: The recording receives mixed reactions – one reviewer finds the new treatment tinny and lacking warmth, another praises its increased clarity – with no performance details available.
review: Listeners are split on this Wise source: a low‑rated review complains that the recent treatment makes the sound overly thin and removes the original warmth, while a five‑star review claims the same version sounds clearer and more powerful. No comments were made about the actual concert performance or setlist.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews with opposing views on sound quality; no musical commentary to boost rating, so an average score reflects the mixed perception.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer describes the treatment as tinny and warm‑less, another notes greater clarity and 'oomph'; overall sound quality is debated.
